series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of a letter sent to vendors outlining a specific project and asking the vendor to submit a proposal as to how the project will be managed and the cost of the project. After all proposals are submitted a decision is made by the unit a

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office area for 1 fiscal year after all proposals have been received, then transfer to storage for 4 fiscal years, then destroy (provided all project issues have been resolved)., Paper: Wastepaper
